prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3486名→3763名→4622名→5711名→4544名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年达到峰值5711名后2025年回升至4544名，近两年波动幅度约1167名，2025年基准位次约4544名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021年73人、2022年73人、2023年74人、2024年75人、2025年76人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势；2026年计划74人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约2.6%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第32名（2021年第27名→2025年第31名→2026年第32名），排名稳定在30名左右，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，主要因校园偷拍事件引发舆论关注，可能对考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第87位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常记录中未见华南理工大学明显断档信号；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、化学工程与技术A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与物理类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等华南理工优势专业方向社会热度持续高热（2024年高热推荐），推高报考意愿；重庆2026年物理类考生约13.6万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年13.9万人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；华南理工大学位于广东广州，对西南地区考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在重庆招生计划占比较小（约70余人），属于省外优质生源竞争格局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4544名、2026年小幅缩招（-2人）及物理类考生略减的供需变化；考虑声誉负面及专业热度持续高位等因素做有限修正，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约4500名，较2025年小幅后移44名，区间4000–5000名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 3486 → 3763 → 4622 → 5711 → 4544, showing a fluctuating and then shifting trend. In 2024, it peaked at 5711, then rebounded to 4544 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1167 in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4544. The enrollment plan for this university in the Physics Category in Chongqing was 73 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 76 in 2025, showing a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight contraction of about 2.6%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings was 32nd in 2026 (27th in 2021 → 31st in 2025 → 32nd in 2026), stable around 30th, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative, mainly due to a campus peeping incident that attracted public attention, which may slightly suppress candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average evaluation), with low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious signal of a ranking drop was found in historical admission anomaly records. It has 9 A- or above disciplines: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. Its engineering strength is outstanding and highly matches the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors at South China University of Technology, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, continue to be highly sought after (highly recommended in 2024), boosting application willingness. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is approximately 136,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight decrease from 139,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, which has some cross-provincial appeal for candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively small (about 70 people), placing it in a competitive landscape for high-quality out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4544, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (-2 students), and the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates, combined with factors such as negative reputation and sustained high popularity of majors, with limited adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 4500, a slight shift of 44 places from 2025, with a range of 4000–5000.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 32nd. Although it is strong in engineering, as a comprehensive 985 university, it still holds strong appeal for liberal arts students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to a campus peeping incident that attracted public attention, which may slightly suppress candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average evaluation), with low exposure. SCUT is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and has a certain cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts candidates in the southwestern region.
